SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Show battery percentage
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Display the % text next to the battery icon

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Hide status bar
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Maximize screen space on the main display

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Rotate display 180° (normal mode)
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Useful for matching charge port orientation

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Rotate display 180° (HUD mode)
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Useful for matching charge port orientation
